key_players.name: Jordan Morris
key_players.bio: Homegrown talent and Seattle native. Turned down Bundesliga offers to stay with the Sounders. Fan favorite since his debut in 2016. Known for his pace and tireless work rate.
key_players.personality_note: Local kid who chose to stay home. Deeply connected to the city and supporters. Often seen at community events around Seattle.

milestone_100th_goal.context: Scored his 100th career Sounders goal in the final preseason match. Post-match interview: 'Every goal I've scored has been for this city. The supporters carried me through the injuries and the hard years.'

recent_form.contribution: 1 goal, 1 assist. Man of the match.
2 goals. Brace in Cascadia Cup match.

key_players.name: Albert Rusnak
key_players.bio: Creative midfielder who pulls the strings in the Sounders attack. Joined from Real Salt Lake in 2022 and quickly became the team's primary playmaker.
key_players.personality_note: Quiet professional. Lets his passing do the talking. Appreciated by tactical fans who notice the details.

key_players.name: Yeimar Gomez Andrade
key_players.bio: Rock-solid center back and defensive leader. Known for his aerial dominance and last-ditch tackles. One of the most reliable defenders in MLS.
key_players.personality_note: Warrior mentality. The fans love his intensity. Celebrates defensive plays like goals.

recent_form.contribution: Solid in a tough away match.

key_players.name: Leo Chu
key_players.bio: Exciting young winger signed in 2025. Electric pace and flair on the ball. Quickly becoming a fan favorite for his dribbling runs.
key_players.personality_note: Flashy and fun to watch. Active on social media. Shares behind-the-scenes content that fans love. Learning English and posts about exploring Seattle.

key_players.name: Stefan Frei
key_players.bio: Club legend. The save in the 2016 MLS Cup final is the most iconic moment in franchise history. In his final season before retirement.
key_players.personality_note: Cerebral, articulate. Beloved by the entire fanbase. His retirement at end of 2026 season is a major storyline. Community leader off the pitch.

career_milestones.farewell_tour: The club announced a season-long celebration of Frei's career. Special tributes planned at each home match.

recent_form.contribution: Key save in 88th minute to preserve the win.
6 saves in a tough away draw.

tactical_notes.style: Possession-based with quick transitions. More attacking than recent seasons under new tactical approach.
tactical_notes.season_narrative: Strong start to 2026. 2W-1D in first 3 matches. The team looks revitalized after a disappointing 2025. New signings integrating well. Frei's farewell season adding emotional weight to every match.

new_signings_2026.name: Diego Valeri Jr.
new_signings_2026.context: Son of former Portland Timbers legend Diego Valeri. The irony of him playing for Seattle has been a major talking point.

new_signings_2026.name: Kwame Asante
new_signings_2026.context: Young Ghanaian talent. Brings energy and pressing ability to the midfield.
